ExplnOfNonFilingWithAGStmt.ExplanationTxt: THE STATE OF WASHINGTON DOES NOT REQUIRE PRIVATE FOUNDATIONS TO SUBMIT A COPY OF THE FORM 990-PF TO THE ATTORNEY GENERAL.
